title: United States resumes naval blockade against Iran and oil reaches $80
summary: Tension in the Middle East intensifies with continued airstrikes and the threat of 20% tariffs on ships.

title: Restaurant employee sent to prosecutors over Dotonbori fire that killed two firefighters
summary: Authorities determined the cause was a cigarette butt and filed charges for gross negligence.

title: Japanese government extends Diet session to debate vice capital law and Imperial House reform
summary: The ruling coalition seeks an additional week to approve key bills while opposition criticizes the process.

title: Japan records highest number of extreme temperature points so far this year
summary: Over 160 stations exceeded 35 degrees and it is recommended to take extreme precautions against heatstroke.

title: Murakami hits nine home runs in Major League home run derby but eliminated in first round
summary: The Japanese slugger participated for the first time in the All-Star Game derby and was eliminated despite a solid performance.

title: NHK announces its 2027 morning drama 'Nagisa no Shinkaron' about a novice veterinarian
summary: The story will take place between Osaka and Yorontō Island and will address the growth of a young veterinarian.

title: ANA pilot sentenced to prison for sexually assaulting a flight attendant
summary: The Tokyo court issued a final sentence for a crime of non-consensual indecency.

title: Kyoto court rejects residents' lawsuit to stop Oi nuclear reactor
summary: The ruling allows Kansai Electric's plant to continue operating despite safety concerns.

title: Two alleged leaders of phone scams and several Taiwanese women detained as money collectors
summary: Japanese police dismantled a fraud network operating from abroad.

title: Tokyo updates natural park rules due to bear presence as home invasions reported
summary: Bear encounters increase and authorities strengthen prevention measures.

title: Nobel laureates warn about massive job loss due to artificial intelligence
summary: The laureates urge governments to act immediately to mitigate the impact on the labor market.

title: Lamine Yamal celebrates his birthday by leading Spain to World Cup final
summary: The 19-year-old young star becomes the most prominent figure of the tournament.

title: Fukuoka assembly vice president denies bribery allegations
summary: Nakao appeared before the media to reject the allegations of money exchange and questioned the recordings.

title: Japan amends data protection law to allow disclosure of medical records without consent
summary: The reform aims to increase transparency but raises concern among privacy advocates.

title: After Zenshin bankruptcy, government investigates payment sector and a bank sells assets
summary: Authorities seek to contain the consequences of the financial collapse and avoid future crises.

title: Japanese government approves basic AI plan and ruling party proposes new social vision
summary: The initiatives aim to position Japan as a leader in artificial intelligence while addressing risks.

title: Pharmaceutical company Alfresa to take over Sega Sammy baseball team scheduled for dissolution
summary: The team will become property of Alfresa, ensuring continuity for players and staff.

title: Volkswagen announces possibility of cutting 50,000 additional jobs in restructuring
summary: The German automaker continues adjustments to face the transition to electrification.

title: Ten European countries including Ukraine launch joint air defense project
summary: The initiative aims to create a common defense system to strengthen regional security.

title: GMO Internet group completely eliminates remote work and orders return to office
summary: The Japanese company decides to end telework mode demanding the presence of all employees.
